gept.question_en: I ___ in Taichung for five years before I moved to Taipei last summer.
gept.explanation_zh: 過去某時間點 (last summer) 之前已持續發生的動作要用過去完成式 had + p.p.，故選 (B) had lived。(A) have lived 是現在完成式，不符合過去的時間參考。(C) live 為現在簡單式。(D) am living 為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: The new MRT line is ___ than the old one and takes us downtown much faster.
gept.explanation_zh: 句中有 than 表示兩者比較，需用比較級 faster，故選 (B)。(A) fast 為原級。(C) fastest 為最高級。(D) more fast 不合語法，單音節形容詞直接加 -er。

gept.question_en: If I ___ you, I would apologize to her right away.
gept.explanation_zh: 與現在事實相反的假設 (Type 2)，if 子句用過去式，be 動詞一律用 were，故選 (C) were。(A) am 為現在式。(B) was 在正式文法的假設語氣中不採用。(D) will be 不可用於 if 子句。

gept.question_en: The meeting ___ to next Friday because the manager is on a business trip.
gept.explanation_zh: 會議是被延期的，需用被動語態，且強調對現在的影響，故用現在完成被動 has been postponed，選 (D)。(A)(B) 為主動語態。(C) has postponed 為現在完成主動，主詞 meeting 不能主動延期。

gept.question_en: The girl ___ is sitting next to the window is my new classmate from Hong Kong.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 the girl 是人且在子句中當主詞，需用主格關係代名詞 who，故選 (C)。(A) which 用於事物。(B) whose 為所有格。(D) whom 為受格。

gept.question_en: My brother enjoys ___ basketball with his friends every weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: enjoy 後接動名詞 V-ing，故選 (C) playing。(A) play 為原形動詞。(B) to play 為不定式，不可接在 enjoy 之後。(D) played 為過去式或過去分詞。

gept.question_en: She has been working on the project ___ early this morning without taking a break.
gept.explanation_zh: since 後面接時間點 (early this morning)，與現在完成進行式搭配，故選 (B)。(A) for 後接一段時間。(C) from 通常與 to 連用。(D) during 後接事件或一段期間。

gept.question_en: If the weather ___ nice tomorrow, we will go hiking in Yangmingshan.
gept.explanation_zh: Type 1 條件句，if 子句用現在式表示未來，主句用 will，故選 (A) is。(B) was 為過去式，不合語意。(C)(D) 都不能用在 if 子句的條件部分。

gept.question_en: I would rather ___ at home tonight than go to the crowded night market.
gept.explanation_zh: would rather 後接原形動詞，故選 (C) stay。(A) staying 為動名詞或現在分詞。(B) to stay 為不定式。(D) stayed 為過去式。

gept.question_en: This is the most delicious mango cake ___ I have ever tasted in my life.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞前有最高級 the most delicious 修飾時，關係代名詞通常用 that，故選 (D)。(A) who 用於人。(B) what 不可當關係代名詞使用。(C) which 文法上可，但最高級之後習慣用 that。

gept.question_en: She ___ to the gym every morning before work.
gept.explanation_zh: 主詞為第三人稱單數she，現在簡單式動詞需加s，故選(C)goes。(A)go為原形，需配合複數主詞。(B)going為現在分詞。(D)gone為過去分詞。

gept.question_en: Look! The children ___ in the playground right now.
gept.explanation_zh: 句首Look!與right now顯示動作正在進行，須用現在進行式are playing，故選(C)。(A)play為原形。(B)plays用於第三人稱單數。(D)played為過去式。

gept.question_en: I ___ my homework when my mother called me.
gept.explanation_zh: 從屬子句when called為過去簡單式，主句表示當時正在進行的動作，須用過去進行式was doing，故選(A)。(B)為現在進行式。(C)為現在簡單式。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: By the time you arrive, I ___ dinner already.
gept.explanation_zh: by the time + 現在式表未來時間點，主句須用未來完成式will have cooked，故選(A)。(D)為現在式。(B)為未來簡單式。(C)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: He ___ in Tokyo for ten years before he moved to Osaka.
gept.explanation_zh: 在過去動作moved之前已持續的動作須用過去完成式had lived，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為現在完成式。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: I ___ never ___ such a beautiful sunset before.
gept.explanation_zh: never與before表至今的經驗，須用現在完成式have seen，故選(A)。(B)had / saw時態不一致。(C)為現在簡單式。(D)時態錯誤。

gept.question_en: My father ___ a new car next month.
gept.explanation_zh: next month為未來時間，須用未來簡單式will buy，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為現在進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: While I ___ the dishes, my husband was vacuuming the floor.
gept.explanation_zh: while引導兩個同時進行的過去動作，須用過去進行式was washing，故選(C)。(A)為原形。(B)為過去簡單式。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: Water ___ at 100 degrees Celsius.
gept.explanation_zh: 科學事實或永恆真理須用現在簡單式，主詞water為單數第三人稱，故選(C)boils。(A)為原形。(B)為現在進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: They ___ married for twenty years next May.
gept.explanation_zh: next May為未來時間點，到那時已持續的狀態須用未來完成式will have been，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: When the phone rang, I ___ a shower.
gept.explanation_zh: 電話響時正在進行的動作須用過去進行式was taking，故選(C)。(A)為原形。(B)為過去簡單式表完成動作。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: I ___ to Paris three times in my life.
gept.explanation_zh: in my life表至今的人生經驗次數，須用現在完成式have been，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式需指明過去時間。(C)為過去完成式。

gept.question_en: As soon as he ___ home, please tell him to call me.
gept.explanation_zh: 時間副詞子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(A)gets。(B)未來式在時間子句中不可用。(C)為過去式。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: She has been writing the novel ___ three years.
gept.explanation_zh: for + 一段時間，表持續期間，故選(C)for。(A)since接時間點。(B)during接特定期間。(D)while為連接詞。

gept.question_en: By next year, my grandmother ___ here for fifty years.
gept.explanation_zh: by next year為未來時間點，到那時已持續的動作須用未來完成式will have lived，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為現在完成式。(C)為過去式。

gept.question_en: I ___ TV when my friend knocked on the door.
gept.explanation_zh: 敲門時正在進行的動作須用過去進行式was watching，故選(B)。(A)為現在式。(C)為現在完成式。(D)為未來式。

gept.question_en: The train ___ at 7:30 every morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 時刻表為慣常事實，須用現在簡單式，第三人稱單數加s，故選(C)leaves。(A)為原形。(B)為現在進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: He ___ his car since last week.
gept.explanation_zh: since last week強調動作從過去持續到現在，須用現在完成進行式has been repairing，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為現在進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: I ___ you tomorrow at the café.
gept.explanation_zh: tomorrow為未來時間，須用未來簡單式will meet，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: She ___ her keys, so she can't open the door.
gept.explanation_zh: 過去動作對現在有影響(現在無法開門)，須用現在完成式has lost，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式無關現在。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: When I was a child, I ___ play in the park every day.
gept.explanation_zh: used to + 原形表過去習慣或狀態，故選(B)used to。(A)拼字錯誤。(C)為「習慣於」。(D)時態不符。

gept.question_en: Every summer, we ___ go camping in the mountains.
gept.explanation_zh: would + 原形表過去重複性習慣，故選(A)would。(B)為未來式。(C)為be going to未來式。(D)為現在完成式助動詞。

gept.question_en: He ___ smoke a lot, but he quit last year.
gept.explanation_zh: used to表過去常做但現在不做的動作，故選(C)used to。(A)拼字錯誤。(B)為「習慣於」。(D)為「逐漸習慣」。

gept.question_en: Look at the dark clouds! It ___ rain soon.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據眼前徵兆預測未來，須用be going to，故選(C)。(A)will用於即興決定或推測。(B)would為過去式。(D)為完成式助動詞。

gept.question_en: I have decided. I ___ buy that laptop tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 已預先計畫的未來行動須用be going to，故選(B)。(A)will表即興決定。(C)would為過去式。(D)might表可能。

gept.question_en: OK, I ___ help you carry those boxes.
gept.explanation_zh: 當下臨時決定的承諾須用will，故選(B)。(A)為事先計畫。(C)為過去式。(D)為過去習慣。

gept.question_en: ___ you pass me the salt, please?
gept.explanation_zh: 禮貌請求須用Could，故選(C)。(A)May用於請求許可較正式。(B)Should表建議。(D)Must表必須。

gept.question_en: You ___ wear a seatbelt while driving. It's the law.
gept.explanation_zh: 法律規定的義務須用must，故選(C)。(A)may表許可。(B)can表能力或許可。(D)might表可能。

gept.question_en: When I was young, I ___ run very fast.
gept.explanation_zh: 過去的能力須用could，故選(B)。(A)can為現在能力。(C)may表許可或可能。(D)must表必須。

gept.question_en: You ___ smoke in this building. It's strictly prohibited.
gept.explanation_zh: 嚴禁的禁止須用mustn't，故選(A)。(B)needn't表不需要。(C)don't have to表不必。(D)wouldn't為過去意願。

gept.question_en: You ___ come if you don't want to. It's optional.
gept.explanation_zh: 非強制(可選擇)須用don't have to表不必，故選(B)。(A)為禁止。(C)為不能。(D)為不應該。

gept.question_en: You ___ see a doctor about that cough.
gept.explanation_zh: 給予建議須用should，故選(D)。(A)may表許可。(B)can表能力。(C)might表可能。

gept.question_en: ___ I borrow your pen for a moment?
gept.explanation_zh: 請求許可禮貌的用法須用May，故選(B)。(A)Must表必須。(C)Should表建議。(D)Would用於詢問意願。

gept.question_en: Students ___ submit their assignments by Friday.
gept.explanation_zh: 規定義務須用must，故選(D)。(A)can表能力。(B)may表許可。(C)might表可能。

gept.question_en: He ___ speak five languages fluently.
gept.explanation_zh: 表達能力須用can，故選(A)。(B)must表必須。(C)should表應該。(D)may表許可或可能。

gept.question_en: You look exhausted. You ___ go to bed early tonight.
gept.explanation_zh: 給予建議須用should，故選(B)。(A)Must過於強烈為命令。(C)Can表能力。(D)May表許可。

gept.question_en: In Taiwan, you ___ vote when you are 20 years old.
gept.explanation_zh: 年滿20歲擁有投票的能力與權利，須用can，故選(A)。(B)must表強制義務。(C)should表建議。(D)may表許可較不貼切。

gept.question_en: You ___ tell anyone the secret. Promise me!
gept.explanation_zh: 嚴禁說出秘密須用mustn't，故選(A)。(B)為不必。(C)為不需要。(D)為過去無法。

gept.question_en: ___ you mind opening the window?
gept.explanation_zh: Would you mind...為禮貌請求慣用句，故選(B)。(A)Will較不正式。(C)Should表建議。(D)Must表必須。

gept.question_en: She ___ play the piano when she was only five.
gept.explanation_zh: 過去能力須用could，故選(D)。(A)為現在能力。(B)表許可。(C)表必須。

gept.question_en: He didn't answer his phone. He ___ in a meeting.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據合理推斷(沒接電話)，幾乎確定是某事，須用must be，故選(A)。(B)為不可能。(C)為應該。(D)為過去意願。

gept.question_en: That ___ Tom over there. Tom is in London right now.
gept.explanation_zh: 湯姆在倫敦，故那人不可能是他，須用can't be，故選(B)。(A)為一定是。(C)(D)為可能是。

gept.question_en: She didn't eat lunch. She ___ very hungry now.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據事實(沒吃午餐)的肯定推測須用must be，故選(C)。(A)為可能。(B)為不可能。(D)為不應該。

gept.question_en: Whose bag is this? It ___ John's. He just left.
gept.explanation_zh: 不確定但有可能須用might be，故選(D)。(A)為一定是過於肯定。(B)為不可能。(C)為禁止。

gept.question_en: Look at the lights in his house. He ___ at home.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據燈光的證據幾乎肯定他在家，須用must be，故選(A)。(B)為不可能。(C)為不應該。(D)為不會。

gept.question_en: She speaks English perfectly. She ___ a native speaker.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據說話流利度推測是母語者，須用must be，故選(A)。(B)為不可能。(C)為可能(較不肯定)。(D)為不需要。

gept.question_en: That ___ true. I saw it with my own eyes.
gept.explanation_zh: 親眼所見不可能是假的，須用can't be，故選(B)。(A)為一定是。(C)為可能不。(D)為不需要。

gept.question_en: He looks pale. He ___ feeling sick.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據臉色蒼白幾乎肯定生病，須用must be，故選(D)。(A)為不會。(B)為不可能。(C)為不應該。

gept.question_en: It's only 6 a.m. The shops ___ open yet.
gept.explanation_zh: 清晨6點商店不可能開門，須用can't be，故選(B)。(A)為一定。(C)語意不夠肯定。(D)為不會(預測)。

gept.question_en: I'm not sure where she is. She ___ in the library.
gept.explanation_zh: 不確定但有可能須用might be，故選(D)。(A)為一定。(B)為不可能。(C)為不會。

gept.question_en: I'm sorry I'm late. I ___ have missed the bus.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據遲到事實，幾乎肯定錯過公車，須用must have + p.p.，故選(A)。(B)can't have表不可能。(C)should have表應該但沒做。(D)would have表假設。

gept.question_en: You ___ have studied harder. You failed the test.
gept.explanation_zh: 事後責備或建議「本來應該做卻沒做」須用should have，故選(B)。(A)must have表肯定推測。(C)can have無此用法。(D)may have表可能做過。

gept.question_en: He ___ have stolen the money. He was with me all day.
gept.explanation_zh: 有不在場證明，不可能偷錢，須用can't have，故選(B)。(A)為一定。(C)為應該。(D)為可能。

gept.question_en: She didn't come to class. She ___ have been sick.
gept.explanation_zh: 推測過去可能的原因須用might have，故選(C)。(A)語氣過強。(B)為不可能。(D)為應該但沒做。

gept.question_en: I ___ have told her the truth. Now she's angry with me.
gept.explanation_zh: 事後後悔做了不該做的事，須用shouldn't have，故選(B)。(A)為一定做了。(C)為當時不可能。(D)語意不通順。

gept.question_en: You ___ have called me. I was worried.
gept.explanation_zh: 指責對方「本來可以做卻沒做」須用could have，故選(A)。(B)為不可能。(C)為過去禁止。(D)為不必要。

gept.question_en: The window is broken. Someone ___ have broken it.
gept.explanation_zh: 根據窗戶破掉的事實，肯定有人打破，須用must have，故選(A)。(B)為不可能。(C)為不應該。(D)為不需要。

gept.question_en: She ___ have left already. Her car is still in the parking lot.
gept.explanation_zh: 車子還在停車場，所以不可能已離開，須用can't have，故選(B)。(A)為一定。(C)為應該。(D)為假設。

gept.question_en: I ___ have bought that expensive watch. I'm broke now.
gept.explanation_zh: 事後後悔做了不該做的事(買了昂貴手錶)，須用shouldn't have，故選(C)。(A)為一定。(B)為應該。(D)為不可能。

gept.question_en: He ___ have forgotten about the meeting. He's usually punctual.
gept.explanation_zh: 推測過去可能發生的原因須用may have，故選(D)。(A)語氣過強。(B)為不應該。(C)為不需要。

gept.question_en: When she came home, her children ___ already ___ to bed.
gept.explanation_zh: 在過去時間點(came home)之前完成的動作須用過去完成式had gone，故選(A)。(B)為現在完成式。(C)為過去進行式。(D)為過去簡單式。

gept.question_en: After he ___ his homework, he watched TV.
gept.explanation_zh: 過去兩動作中先發生的須用過去完成式had finished，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為現在完成式。(D)為動名詞。

gept.question_en: I realized that I ___ my wallet at home.
gept.explanation_zh: realized為過去式，發現之前已發生的事須用過去完成式had left，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: The thief ___ already ___ when the police arrived.
gept.explanation_zh: 警察到達之前已逃離，須用過去完成式had escaped，故選(B)。(A)為現在完成式。(C)為過去進行式。(D)為過去簡單式。

gept.question_en: By the time the movie started, we ___ our seats.
gept.explanation_zh: by the time + 過去式，主句須用過去完成式had taken，故選(D)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: I ___ tea right now, not coffee.
gept.explanation_zh: want為情感狀態動詞，通常不用進行式，須用現在簡單式want，故選(A)。(B)狀態動詞不用進行式。(C)為第三人稱單數。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: She ___ to know the truth.
gept.explanation_zh: need為狀態動詞，不用進行式，第三人稱單數加s為needs，故選(D)。(A)狀態動詞不用進行式。(B)為原形。(C)為現在分詞。

gept.question_en: I ___ the new perfume. It smells wonderful!
gept.explanation_zh: like為情感狀態動詞，不用進行式，須用現在簡單式like，故選(A)。(B)狀態動詞不用進行式。(C)為第三人稱單數。(D)為現在分詞。

gept.question_en: He ___ tired today, so he won't come to the party.
gept.explanation_zh: feel為狀態動詞，第三人稱單數現在式須用feels，故選(D)。(A)為原形。(B)雖可用進行式但現在簡單式更貼切。(C)為過去式。

gept.question_en: This soup ___ delicious. Who made it?
gept.explanation_zh: taste作連綴動詞描述狀態，須用現在簡單式tastes，故選(B)。(A)為原形。(C)狀態動詞不用進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: The plane ___ to take off. Please fasten your seatbelt.
gept.explanation_zh: be about to + 原形表即將做某事，故選(A)。(B)缺少be動詞。(C)後面要接to take off的話須加to。(D)為未來式。

gept.question_en: I was ___ to call you when you called me.
gept.explanation_zh: be about to + 原形表正要做某事，故選(D)。(A)on the verge of後接動名詞。(B)缺to。(C)語意不符。

gept.question_en: She is on the ___ of tears.
gept.explanation_zh: on the verge of為固定片語，表瀕臨，故選(B)verge。(A)edge用法不同。(C)on the point of亦可但選項固定為verge。(D)brink用於危險邊緣。

gept.question_en: The company is on the verge of ___ bankrupt.
gept.explanation_zh: on the verge of + 動名詞，故選(B)going。(A)為原形。(C)為不定詞。(D)為過去分詞。

gept.question_en: I'm ___ to leave; can you wait a minute?
gept.explanation_zh: be about to + 原形表即將做某事，故選(D)。(A)缺to/the verge of。(B)缺the及of。(C)語意不符。

gept.question_en: He ___ in this company since 2010.
gept.explanation_zh: since + 過去時間點，動作從過去持續至今，須用現在完成式has worked，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: They ___ dinner when we arrived.
gept.explanation_zh: 我們到達時，他們正在用餐，須用過去進行式were having，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式表完成。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: I'll call you when I ___ home.
gept.explanation_zh: when引導的時間副詞子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(A)get。(B)未來式不可用於時間子句。(C)為過去式。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: Before you ___ the room, please turn off the lights.
gept.explanation_zh: before引導的時間副詞子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(A)leave。(B)未來式不可用於時間子句。(C)為過去式。(D)為動名詞。

gept.question_en: We'll wait here until the rain ___.
gept.explanation_zh: until為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(D)stops。(A)未來式不可用於時間子句。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: As soon as she ___ the news, she will call you.
gept.explanation_zh: as soon as為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(D)hears。(A)未來式不可用於時間子句。(B)為過去式。(C)hear狀態動詞不用進行式。

gept.question_en: After I ___ this book, I'll lend it to you.
gept.explanation_zh: after為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(D)finish。(A)未來式不可用於時間子句。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: When you ___ at the airport, please send me a message.
gept.explanation_zh: when為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(A)arrive。(B)未來式不可用於時間子句。(C)為過去式。(D)為動名詞。

gept.question_en: I'll have dinner ready by the time you ___ home.
gept.explanation_zh: by the time為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(D)come。(A)未來式不可用於時間子句。(B)為過去式。(C)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: Don't leave until I ___ back.
gept.explanation_zh: until為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(A)come。(B)未來式不可用於時間子句。(C)為過去式。(D)為動名詞。

gept.question_en: Once the cake ___ ready, we'll eat it.
gept.explanation_zh: once為時間連接詞，子句中以現在式代替未來式，故選(D)is。(A)未來式不可用於時間子句。(B)為過去式。(C)為動名詞。

gept.question_en: My grandfather ___ a heavy smoker, but now he doesn't smoke at all.
gept.explanation_zh: used to + 原形表過去狀態(現在不再如此)，故選(A)used to be。(B)was used to為「過去習慣於」後接動名詞。(C)為現在習慣於。(D)拼字錯誤。

gept.question_en: I ___ have long hair, but I cut it last month.
gept.explanation_zh: used to可表過去狀態(長頭髮為狀態)，would不可用於狀態，故選(A)。(B)would不用於過去狀態。(C)為過去習慣於後接動名詞。(D)為現在習慣於。

gept.question_en: When my dad was young, he ___ ride his bike to school.
gept.explanation_zh: used to + 原形表過去習慣，故選(B)。(A)拼字錯誤。(C)為現在習慣於。(D)為過去習慣於後接動名詞。

gept.question_en: On rainy days, we ___ stay home and play board games.
gept.explanation_zh: would + 原形表過去重複性習慣動作，故選(D)。(A)為未來式。(B)語意不完整。(C)為完成式助動詞。

gept.question_en: Look! Someone ___ on your bicycle.
gept.explanation_zh: Look!與當下情景顯示現在正在進行，須用現在進行式is sitting，故選(B)。(A)為現在式。(C)為過去式。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: By 2030, scientists ___ a cure for cancer.
gept.explanation_zh: By 2030為未來時間點，到那時前完成的動作須用未來完成式will have found，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為未來簡單式。(D)為現在進行式。

gept.question_en: My sister ___ the violin for over ten years.
gept.explanation_zh: for + 一段時間表持續至今，須用現在完成式has played，故選(B)。(A)為現在式。(C)為現在進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: I ___ this movie three times already.
gept.explanation_zh: already與次數顯示至今的經驗，須用現在完成式have seen，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(D)為過去完成式。

gept.question_en: They ___ for the bus when I saw them this morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 看到他們時他們正在等公車，須用過去進行式were waiting，故選(B)。(A)為現在式。(C)為現在完成式。(D)為過去式表完成。

gept.question_en: The Earth ___ around the Sun.
gept.explanation_zh: 科學事實須用現在簡單式，主詞單數加s為revolves，故選(B)。(A)為原形。(C)永恆真理不用進行式。(D)為過去式。

gept.question_en: He hurt his leg while he ___ basketball.
gept.explanation_zh: 受傷時正在進行的動作須用過去進行式was playing，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式表完成。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: She ___ him for years before they got married.
gept.explanation_zh: 結婚前已交往多年，須用過去完成式had dated，故選(C)。(A)為現在式。(B)為過去式。(D)為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: ___ I help you with the dishes?
gept.explanation_zh: Shall I...?為提供幫助的常見用法，故選(D)。(A)為必須。(B)Should亦可但Shall更地道。(C)Would用法不同。

gept.question_en: Children ___ obey their parents.
gept.explanation_zh: 道德建議或應該做的事須用should，故選(D)。(A)表許可。(B)表可能。(C)為過去意願。

gept.question_en: If it ___ tomorrow, we will cancel the picnic.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句：if 子句用現在簡單式（A）rains，主句用 will。（B）will rain 在 if 子句不可用 will。（C）rained 為過去式，屬第二條件。（D）would rain 屬第二條件主句形式。

gept.question_en: If you study hard, you ___ pass the exam.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句主句用 will（B）。（A）would 屬第二條件。（C）would have 屬第三條件。（D）had 文法不通。

gept.question_en: If she ___ time, she will help you.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（C）has。（A）had 屬第二條件。（B）will have 在 if 子句中不可用。（D）would have 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: We ___ go to the beach if the weather is good.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句主句用 will（D）。（A）would 屬第二條件。（B）would have 屬第三條件。（C）had 文法不通。

gept.question_en: If he ___ the bus, he will be late.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（A）misses。（B）missed 屬第二條件。（C）will miss 在 if 子句中不可用。（D）would miss 為主句形式。

gept.question_en: You will get sick if you ___ enough sleep.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式否定（B）don't get。（A）didn't get 屬第二條件。（C）won't get 在 if 子句中不可用 will。（D）wouldn't get 屬第二條件主句。

gept.question_en: If they ___ early, they can catch the train.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（D）leave，主句用 can。（A）left 屬第二條件。（B）（C）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: If you ___ Mary, tell her to call me.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（B）see。（A）（C）（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: He will be angry if you ___ late again.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（C）are。（A）were 屬第二條件。（B）will be 在 if 子句不可用。（D）would be 屬第二條件。

gept.question_en: If it ___ cold tonight, take a jacket.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句搭配祈使句，if 子句用現在式（D）gets。（A）got 為過去式。（B）（C）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: If we ___ now, we'll arrive on time.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（A）leave。（B）屬第二條件。（C）屬第二條件主句。（D）屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: What ___ you do if it rains?
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件問句主句用 will（B）。（A）would 屬第二條件。（C）do 文法不通。（D）are 文法不通。

gept.question_en: If she ___ harder, she can win.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（C）tries，主句用 can。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If the store ___ open, we'll buy some milk.
gept.explanation_zh: 第一條件句 if 子句用現在式（D）is。（A）was 屬第二條件。（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If I ___ rich, I would travel the world.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式，be 動詞用 were（B）。（A）am 屬第一條件。（C）will be 在 if 子句不可用。（D）had been 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: If he ___ here, he would help us.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句 be 動詞用 were（A）。（B）is 屬第一條件。（C）形式不符。（D）had been 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: She ___ buy a new car if she had the money.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句主句用 would（D）。（A）will 屬第一條件。（C）would have 屬第三條件。（B）had 文法不通。

gept.question_en: If I ___ you, I would apologize.
gept.explanation_zh: 假設語氣 If I were you，be 動詞用 were（B）。（A）am 不適合假設句。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If they ___ more time, they could finish the project.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式（C）had，主句用 could。（A）have 屬第一條件。（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: What would you do if you ___ a million dollars?
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件問句 if 子句用過去式（A）won。（B）win 屬第一條件。（C）形式不符。（D）had won 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: If she ___ harder, she would get better grades.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式（D）studied。（A）studies 屬第一條件。（B）形式不符。（C）had studied 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: I ___ travel more if I had more vacation days.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句主句用 would（A）。（B）will 屬第一條件。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If he ___ a car, he would drive to work.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式（B）had。（A）has 屬第一條件。（C）形式不符。（D）had had 屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: If I ___ taller, I could play basketball professionally.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 be 動詞用 were（D）。（A）（B）（C）形式不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: They would visit us if they ___ in town.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句 be 動詞用 were（A）。（B）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If we ___ a bigger house, we would invite more friends.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式（C）had。（A）（B）（D）均不符。

gept.question_en: I would tell you if I ___ the answer.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 if 子句用過去式（C）knew。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If it ___ raining, we would go for a walk.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 be 動詞用 weren't（A）。（B）屬第一條件。（C）形式錯誤。（D）屬第三條件。

gept.question_en: If she ___ here right now, she would be happy.
gept.explanation_zh: 第二條件句 be 動詞用 were（D）。（A）（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If I had known, I ___ told you.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句主句用 would have + 過去分詞（D）。（A）形式錯誤。（B）would 屬第二條件。（C）had 文法不通。

gept.question_en: She would have come if you ___ her.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（C）had invited。（A）屬第一條件。（B）屬第二條件。（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: If we ___ earlier, we wouldn't have missed the train.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（A）had left。（B）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: He ___ the job if he had applied.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句主句用 would have + 過去分詞（C）would have got。（A）屬第一條件。（B）屬第二條件。（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: If I ___ about the meeting, I would have attended.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（B）had known。（A）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: They would have helped if you ___ them.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（D）had asked。（A）（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If she ___ harder, she would have passed.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（C）had studied。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: I would have called you if I ___ your number.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（A）had had。（B）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If he ___ the bus, he wouldn't have been late.
gept.explanation_zh: 第三條件句 if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（B）had caught。（A）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If I had studied medicine, I ___ a doctor now.
gept.explanation_zh: 混合條件句：過去條件（had studied）+ 現在結果，主句用 would + 原形（C）would be。（A）（B）形式不符。（D）would have been 為純第三條件。

gept.question_en: If she weren't so shy, she ___ asked him out yesterday.
gept.explanation_zh: 混合條件句：現在條件（weren't）+ 過去結果，主句用 would have + 過去分詞（A）。（B）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If you had taken the medicine, you ___ better now.
gept.explanation_zh: 混合條件句：過去條件 + 現在結果，主句用 would + 原形（D）would feel。（C）屬純第三條件。

gept.question_en: If I ___ more careful, I wouldn't be in this trouble.
gept.explanation_zh: 混合條件句：過去條件 + 現在結果，if 子句用 had + 過去分詞（C）had been。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If he ___ a better student, he would have got the scholarship.
gept.explanation_zh: 混合條件句：現在/一般狀態條件（were）+ 過去結果。（B）were 描述一直以來的狀態。（A）（C）（D）形式不符此用法。

gept.question_en: ___ you study hard, you will fail.
gept.explanation_zh: unless = if not（C）。（A）If 語意相反。（B）As long as 表只要。（D）Provided 表前提，語意均不符。

gept.question_en: You can borrow my car ___ you drive carefully.
gept.explanation_zh: as long as 表只要（D）。（A）unless 語意相反。（B）if not 語意相反。（C）whether 表是否。

gept.question_en: ___ that you finish on time, you can leave early.
gept.explanation_zh: Provided (that) 表前提條件（D）。（A）Unless 語意相反。（B）If not 語意相反。（C）Whether 表是否。

gept.question_en: ___ if it rains tomorrow? Should we cancel?
gept.explanation_zh: What if 表假設（A）。（B）（C）（D）均不構成此固定句型。

gept.question_en: I won't go ___ you come with me.
gept.explanation_zh: unless = if not，表除非（B）。（A）if 語意需加 not。（C）（D）表只要，語意不符。

gept.question_en: ___ I known about the traffic, I would have left earlier.
gept.explanation_zh: 倒裝條件句：Had I known = If I had known（B）。（A）If 不可倒裝。（C）Were 用於現在/be。（D）Should 用於可能性。

gept.question_en: ___ you to need help, please call me.
gept.explanation_zh: Were you to = If you were to（C），表未來假設。（A）不可倒裝。（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: ___ you have any questions, feel free to ask.
gept.explanation_zh: Should you = If you should（D），表可能性。（A）不可倒裝。（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: ___ I been there, I would have helped.
gept.explanation_zh: Had I been = If I had been（A），第三條件倒裝。（B）不可倒裝。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: ___ he to apologize, I would forgive him.
gept.explanation_zh: Were he to = If he were to（C），未來假設倒裝。（A）不可倒裝。（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: The cake ___ by my mother yesterday.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式過去簡單：was/were + 過去分詞（C）was baked。（A）主動。（B）現在被動。（D）非完整動詞形式。

gept.question_en: The letter ___ tomorrow morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式未來：will be + 過去分詞（A）。（B）主動。（C）現在被動。（D）過去被動。

gept.question_en: The report ___ now.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在進行：is being + 過去分詞（D）。（A）主動進行。（B）主動。（C）過去被動。

gept.question_en: The bridge ___ since last year.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在完成：has/have been + 過去分詞（C）has been built。（A）主動。（B）現在被動。（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: The house ___ when we arrived.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式過去進行：was/were being + 過去分詞（A）。（B）主動進行。（C）主動。（D）現在被動。

gept.question_en: The project ___ by the end of this month.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式未來：will be + 過去分詞（D）。（A）主動。（B）現在被動。（C）過去被動。

gept.question_en: English ___ all over the world.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在簡單：is + 過去分詞（B）is spoken。（A）主動。（C）過去式。（D）非完整動詞。

gept.question_en: The window ___ by the strong wind.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式過去簡單：was + 過去分詞（A）was broken。（B）主動過去。（C）現在被動。（D）主動現在。

gept.question_en: This song ___ by the band before.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在完成：has been + 過去分詞（D）。（A）主動完成。（B）現在被動。（C）過去進行。

gept.question_en: The dishes ___ at the moment.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在進行：are being + 過去分詞（B）。（A）主動進行。（C）主動。（D）過去被動。

gept.question_en: The new policy ___ next month.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式未來：will be + 過去分詞（C）。（A）主動。（B）現在被動。（D）過去被動。

gept.question_en: The keys ___ on the table when she came in.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式過去簡單：were + 過去分詞（B）were left。（A）主動原形。（C）現在被動。（D）非完整動詞。

gept.question_en: The package ___ already.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式現在完成：has been + 過去分詞（D）。（A）主動完成。（B）現在被動。（C）主動過去。

gept.question_en: The car ___ when I saw it.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動式過去進行：was being + 過去分詞（A）。（B）主動進行。（C）現在被動。（D）主動過去。

gept.question_en: This homework ___ by tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態被動：must be + 過去分詞（B）。（A）主動形式。（C）現在被動陳述。（D）主動過去。

gept.question_en: The report ___ before the meeting.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態被動：should be + 過去分詞（A）。（B）主動。（C）（D）形式不符被動。

gept.question_en: This problem ___ immediately.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態被動：can be + 過去分詞（C）。（A）主動。（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: All visitors ___ at the entrance.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態被動：might be + 過去分詞（D）。（A）主動。（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: The documents ___ confidential.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態被動：must be + 過去分詞（A）。（B）主動。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: She had her car ___ at the garage.
gept.explanation_zh: have something done：had her car repaired（B）。（A）（C）（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: They are having their house ___ this week.
gept.explanation_zh: have something done 進行式：having + 物 + 過去分詞（C）painted。（A）（B）（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: I need to have my watch ___.
gept.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞：have my watch fixed（D）。（A）（B）（C）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: He had his suit ___ for the wedding.
gept.explanation_zh: have + 物 + 過去分詞：had his suit cleaned（B）。（A）（C）（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: He ___ promoted last month.
gept.explanation_zh: get-passive 強調動作發生：got promoted（A）。（B）was 雖文法可，但題型強調動作改變用 get。（C）（D）形式不符 promoted 過去分詞配合過去時間。

gept.question_en: She ___ married last summer.
gept.explanation_zh: get married 為常見 get-passive 慣用語（B）。（A）was married 表狀態，題意「結婚」動作用 got。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: Be careful or you'll ___ hurt.
gept.explanation_zh: get hurt 為 get-passive，表受傷動作（C）。（A）be hurt 較弱。（B）（D）搭配不自然。

gept.question_en: My phone ___ stolen on the bus.
gept.explanation_zh: get-passive 強調意外動作：got stolen（D）。（A）was 較中性。（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: They ___ divorced after ten years.
gept.explanation_zh: get divorced 為 get-passive 慣用語（B）。（A）were 較不自然。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: I wish I ___ taller.
gept.explanation_zh: wish + 過去式假設語氣，be 動詞用 were（C）。（A）（B）（D）形式不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: She wishes she ___ more money.
gept.explanation_zh: wish + 過去式表現在願望（A）had。（B）現在式。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: I wish I ___ harder for the exam.
gept.explanation_zh: wish + 過去完成式表對過去的遺憾（C）had studied。（A）表現在願望。（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: He wishes he ___ that car last year.
gept.explanation_zh: wish + 過去完成式表對過去的遺憾（D）had bought。（A）（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: I wish you ___ here yesterday.
gept.explanation_zh: wish + 過去完成式表對過去的遺憾（A）had been。（B）（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If only I ___ the truth!
gept.explanation_zh: If only + 過去式表現在願望（B）knew。（A）（D）形式不符。（C）had known 表對過去的遺憾，此處語意指現在。

gept.question_en: It's time we ___ home.
gept.explanation_zh: It's time + 過去式表該做某事（A）went。（B）（C）（D）形式不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: I'd rather you ___ smoke here.
gept.explanation_zh: would rather + 過去式表偏好（C）didn't。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: If only he ___ here now to help us.
gept.explanation_zh: If only + 過去式表現在願望，be 動詞用 were（C）。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: It's high time you ___ a decision.
gept.explanation_zh: It's high time + 過去式表該做某事（D）made。（A）（B）（C）形式不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: He said he ___ tired.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接引述時態後退：is 變 was（B）。（A）未後退。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: She told me she ___ the book.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接引述時態後退：has read/read 變 had read（A）。（B）（C）（D）形式不符後退。

gept.question_en: They said they ___ come the next day.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接引述時態後退：will 變 would（C）。（A）未後退。（B）（D）語意不符。

gept.question_en: He explained that he ___ working there for years.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接引述時態後退：has been 變 had been（A）。（B）（C）（D）形式不符後退。

gept.question_en: He asked me ___ I was hungry.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接 yes/no 問句用 if/whether（C）。（A）that 用於陳述。（B）what 用於 wh-問句。（D）when 為時間問句。

gept.question_en: She asked me where ___.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接問句用陳述語序並後退時態（B）I lived。（A）（D）保留疑問語序錯誤。（C）未後退時態。

gept.question_en: The teacher told us ___ quiet.
gept.explanation_zh: tell + 受詞 + to V，間接命令（D）to be。（A）（B）（C）形式不符。

gept.question_en: He asked her ___ him.
gept.explanation_zh: ask + 受詞 + to V，間接請求（C）to help。（A）（B）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: My mother told me ___ late.
gept.explanation_zh: 間接命令否定用 not to + V（A）not to be。（B）直接命令。（C）（D）形式不符。

gept.question_en: The meeting will start ___ 9 a.m. sharp tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 具體時刻用 at，故選（A）at。（B）on 用於日期或星期。（C）in 用於月份、年份或較長時段。（D）by 表示「在……之前」，語意不符。

gept.question_en: My grandfather was born ___ a cold morning in December.
gept.explanation_zh: 特定日期或某天的早晨用 on，故選（B）on。（A）at 用於時刻。（C）in 用於月份或泛指上午。（D）during 用於整個期間，搭配不自然。

gept.question_en: She has lived in Taipei ___ 2010.
gept.explanation_zh: 完成式搭配明確起點年份用 since，故選（D）since。（A）for 後接時間長度。（C）from 須與 to 連用。（B）by 表期限。

gept.question_en: I have studied Japanese ___ three years.
gept.explanation_zh: 持續一段時間用 for，故選（D）for。（A）since 接時間點。（C）during 接事件名詞。（B）in 表「在……之內」或時段。

gept.question_en: Please finish the report ___ Friday afternoon.
gept.explanation_zh: 「在某時間之前完成」用 by，故選（D）by。（A）until 表「持續到」。（C）since 表起點。（B）for 表期間。

gept.question_en: We waited ___ the rain stopped.
gept.explanation_zh: 「等到……為止」用 until，故選（D）until。（A）by 表完成期限。（C）since 表起點。（B）for 表持續期間。

gept.question_en: The library is closed ___ the summer vacation.
gept.explanation_zh: 接名詞片語表「在……期間」用 during，故選（A）during。（B）while 為連接詞接子句。（C）for 接時間長度。（D）since 表起點。

gept.question_en: He promised to return ___ a week.
gept.explanation_zh: 「在一週之內」用 within，故選（D）within。（A）after 表「之後」。（C）since 表起點。（B）until 表持續到。

gept.question_en: My birthday falls ___ October.
gept.explanation_zh: 月份前用 in，故選（C）in。（A）at 用於時刻。（B）on 用於日期。（D）by 表期限。

gept.question_en: The shop opens ___ Mondays.
gept.explanation_zh: 星期前用 on，故選（D）on。（A）at 用於時刻。（C）in 用於月份。（B）by 表期限。

gept.question_en: I will call you ___ the evening.
gept.explanation_zh: in the evening 為固定搭配，故選（C）in。（A）at 用於 night。（B）on 用於 a specific evening。（D）by 表期限。

gept.question_en: She always reads a book ___ night.
gept.explanation_zh: at night 為固定用法，故選（A）at。（B）on 不搭配 night。（C）in 不可單接 night。（D）by 語意不符。

gept.question_en: We must hand in the homework ___ tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 「最晚到明天」用 by，故選（D）by。（A）until 表持續。（C）since 表起點。（B）in 後接時段。

gept.question_en: He has been ill ___ last Sunday.
gept.explanation_zh: last Sunday 為時間點，搭配完成式用 since，故選（D）since。（A）for 接時間長度。（C）by 表期限。（B）in 不搭配此處。

gept.question_en: The conference will last ___ three days.
gept.explanation_zh: 持續期間用 for，故選（D）for。（A）since 表起點。（C）by 表期限。（B）until 表持續到某點。

gept.question_en: The cat is hiding ___ the table.
gept.explanation_zh: 「在桌子下面」用 under，故選（C）under。（A）on 在上面。（B）at 為地點。（D）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: There is a bridge ___ the river.
gept.explanation_zh: 橋跨越河流用 over，故選（A）over。（B）on 表接觸面。（C）at 為地點。（D）into 表進入。

gept.question_en: She walked ___ the room and sat down.
gept.explanation_zh: 表「進入動作」用 into，故選（D）into。（A）in 表靜態位置。（C）to 表方向終點。（B）at 為地點。

gept.question_en: The post office is ___ the bank and the school.
gept.explanation_zh: 兩者之間用 between，故選（D）between。（A）among 用於三者以上。（C）along 沿著。（B）across 越過。

gept.question_en: He found the ring ___ the crowd.
gept.explanation_zh: 三者以上之中用 among，故選（D）among。（A）between 用於兩者。（C）by 在旁邊。（B）on 接觸面。

gept.question_en: The plane is flying ___ the clouds.
gept.explanation_zh: 「在……上方」用 above，故選（A）above。（B）on 表接觸。（C）at 為地點。（D）into 表進入。

gept.question_en: There is a beautiful park ___ my house.
gept.explanation_zh: 「在我家前面」用 in front of，故選（A）。（B）at 為點。（C）into 表進入。（D）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: He climbed ___ the wall to escape.
gept.explanation_zh: 翻越牆用 over，故選（A）over。（B）on 接觸。（C）at 為點。（D）into 進入。

gept.question_en: We drove ___ the tunnel in five minutes.
gept.explanation_zh: 穿過隧道用 through，故選（D）through。（A）across 越過平面。（C）over 越過上方。（B）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: They walked ___ the bridge to the other side.
gept.explanation_zh: 橫越橋面強調「越過」用 across，故選（D）across。（A）through 穿越。（C）over 強調上方。（B）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: The cat jumped ___ the chair.
gept.explanation_zh: 跳到椅子上強調動作用 onto，故選（A）onto。（B）at 為點。（C）in 靜態。（D）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: The students sat ___ a circle.
gept.explanation_zh: in a circle 為固定搭配，故選（D）in。（A）on 接觸面。（C）at 為點。（B）into 進入。

gept.question_en: He hung the picture ___ the wall.
gept.explanation_zh: 附著於垂直面用 on，故選（C）on。（A）in 表內部。（B）at 為點。（D）into 進入。

gept.question_en: Don't lean ___ the door; it may open.
gept.explanation_zh: 「靠在」用 against，故選（D）against。（A）at 為點。（C）on 表接觸面。（B）by 在旁邊。

gept.question_en: The dog ran ___ the road.
gept.explanation_zh: 橫越馬路用 across，故選（A）across。（B）through 穿越。（C）over 越過上方。（D）along 沿著。

gept.question_en: Success often depends ___ hard work.
gept.explanation_zh: depend on 為固定搭配，故選（D）on。（A）of 不搭配。（C）at 不搭配。（B）with 不搭配。

gept.question_en: You can always rely ___ a true friend.
gept.explanation_zh: rely on 為固定搭配，故選（C）on。（A）of、（B）at、（D）in 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: Water consists ___ hydrogen and oxygen.
gept.explanation_zh: consist of 為固定搭配，故選（D）of。（A）on、（C）in、（B）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: They accused him ___ stealing the money.
gept.explanation_zh: accuse sb. of sth. 為固定搭配，故選（D）of。（A）with、（C）on、（B）for 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He apologized ___ his rude behavior.
gept.explanation_zh: apologize for + 事情用 for，故選（A）for。（B）with 不搭配。（C）on 不搭配。（D）to 接「對象」。

gept.question_en: She insisted ___ paying the bill.
gept.explanation_zh: insist on 為固定搭配，故選（C）on。（A）of、（B）at、（D）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: Please refer ___ the manual for details.
gept.explanation_zh: refer to 為固定搭配，故選（D）to。（A）at、（C）with、（B）on 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: I agree ___ what you just said.
gept.explanation_zh: agree with + 人或意見用 with，故選（A）with。（B）at 不搭配。（C）on 用於議題。（D）of 不搭配。

gept.question_en: Children should listen ___ their parents.
gept.explanation_zh: listen to 為固定搭配，故選（C）to。（A）at、（B）on、（D）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He is suffering ___ a serious illness.
gept.explanation_zh: suffer from 為固定搭配，故選（C）from。（A）with、（B）of、（D）at 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: The teacher complained ___ the noise outside.
gept.explanation_zh: complain about 為固定搭配，故選（A）about。（B）with、（C）on、（D）for 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He doesn't believe ___ ghosts.
gept.explanation_zh: believe in 表「相信存在或價值」，故選（C）in。（A）on、（B）at、（D）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: They argued ___ politics all night.
gept.explanation_zh: argue about + 議題用 about，故選（C）about。（A）on 較少用。（B）with 接「對象」。（D）at 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The success of the plan depends ___ everyone's effort.
gept.explanation_zh: depend on 為固定搭配，故選（C）on。（A）at、（B）with、（D）of 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: She is responsible ___ training new staff.
gept.explanation_zh: be responsible for 為固定搭配，故選（C）for。（A）of、（B）on、（D）at 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: My little sister is afraid ___ thunder.
gept.explanation_zh: be afraid of 為固定搭配，故選（A）of。（B）at、（C）with、（D）on 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: I am very interested ___ ancient history.
gept.explanation_zh: be interested in 為固定搭配，故選（C）in。（A）on、（B）at、（D）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He is good ___ playing the piano.
gept.explanation_zh: be good at 為固定搭配，故選（A）at。（B）in、（C）on、（D）with 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: This town is famous ___ its hot springs.
gept.explanation_zh: be famous for 為固定搭配，故選（B）for。（A）of、（C）with、（D）at 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: She is fond ___ classical music.
gept.explanation_zh: be fond of 為固定搭配，故選（A）of。（B）at、（C）with、（D）on 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He is tired ___ doing the same thing every day.
gept.explanation_zh: be tired of 表「厭倦」，故選（C）of。（A）with、（B）at、（D）for 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: I am worried ___ my final exam.
gept.explanation_zh: be worried about 為固定搭配，故選（C）about。（A）of、（B）with、（D）at 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: She is satisfied ___ her new job.
gept.explanation_zh: be satisfied with 為固定搭配，故選（C）with。（A）on、（B）at、（D）of 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: This bag is similar ___ mine.
gept.explanation_zh: be similar to 為固定搭配，故選（B）to。（A）with、（C）at、（D）of 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He is married ___ a famous singer.
gept.explanation_zh: be married to 為固定搭配，故選（C）to。（A）with 是常見錯誤。（B）at、（D）on 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: I don't know this word; let me ___ it ___ in the dictionary.
gept.explanation_zh: 查字典用 look up，故選（A）。（B）look for 尋找。（C）look after 照顧。（D）look into 調查。

gept.question_en: Please ___ the lights when you leave.
gept.explanation_zh: 離開時關燈用 turn off，故選（B）。（A）turn on 打開。（C）turn up 調大或出現。（D）turn into 變成。

gept.question_en: We have ___ ___ ___ milk; let's buy some.
gept.explanation_zh: 耗盡用 run out of，故選（A）。（B）run into 偶遇。（C）run after 追趕。（D）run over 輾過。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ ___ doing your homework until tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 拖延用 put off，故選（B）。（A）put on 穿上。（C）put up 搭建。（D）put down 放下。

gept.question_en: He finally ___ ___ and admitted he was wrong.
gept.explanation_zh: 屈服讓步用 give in，故選（B）。（A）give up 放棄。（C）give away 贈送。（D）give out 分發。

gept.question_en: I can't ___ ___ his strange behavior.
gept.explanation_zh: 忍受用 put up with，故選（A）。（B）look up to 尊敬。（C）get along with 相處。（D）run out of 耗盡。

gept.question_en: She had to ___ ___ smoking for her health.
gept.explanation_zh: 戒掉用 give up，故選（A）。（B）give in 讓步。（C）give away 贈送。（D）give out 分發。

gept.question_en: The plane will ___ ___ at 8 a.m.
gept.explanation_zh: 飛機起飛用 take off，故選（A）。（B）take up 占用。（C）take in 吸收。（D）take after 長得像。

gept.question_en: He ___ ___ his father; they look exactly alike.
gept.explanation_zh: 長相像用 take after，故選（A）。（B）take off 起飛。（C）take up 占用。（D）take in 吸收。

gept.question_en: I ran ___ an old friend at the supermarket.
gept.explanation_zh: 偶遇用 run into，故選（A）into。（B）run after 追。（C）run over 輾過。（D）run out 耗盡。

gept.question_en: He bought ___ umbrella because it was raining.
gept.explanation_zh: umbrella 母音開頭用 an，故選（B）an。（A）a 用於子音。（C）the 表特指。（D）/ 表零冠詞，不合。

gept.question_en: ___ sun rises in the east.
gept.explanation_zh: 獨一無二的事物用 the，故選（C）The。（A）A、（B）An 用於不定指。（D）零冠詞不適合。

gept.question_en: She plays ___ piano very well.
gept.explanation_zh: 樂器前用 the，故選（C）the。（A）a、（B）an、（D）零冠詞不合此用法。

gept.question_en: ___ honesty is the best policy.
gept.explanation_zh: 抽象名詞泛指用零冠詞，故選（D）/。（A）A、（B）An 用於可數單數。（C）The 表特指。

gept.question_en: He is ___ honest man.
gept.explanation_zh: honest 發音為母音開頭，故選（B）an。（A）a 用於子音音。（C）the 表特指。（D）零冠詞不合。

gept.question_en: My brother plays ___ basketball every weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: 運動名稱前用零冠詞，故選（D）/。（A）a、（B）an、（C）the 均不合。

gept.question_en: I had ___ egg and some toast for breakfast.
gept.explanation_zh: egg 母音開頭用 an，故選（B）an。（A）a 用於子音。（C）the 表特指。（D）零冠詞不合。

gept.question_en: Mount Everest is ___ highest mountain in the world.
gept.explanation_zh: 最高級前用 the，故選（C）the。（A）a、（B）an、（D）零冠詞不合。

gept.question_en: ___ Japanese are well known for their politeness.
gept.explanation_zh: 民族整體前用 The，故選（C）The。（A）A、（B）An 不合。（D）零冠詞不合。

gept.question_en: He goes to ___ school by bus every day.
gept.explanation_zh: 去學校上課用零冠詞，故選（D）/。（A）a 表「某一」。（B）an 不合。（C）the 表特定建築物。

gept.question_en: How ___ sugar do you want in your coffee?
gept.explanation_zh: sugar 為不可數，用 much，故選（B）much。（A）many 接可數。（C）few、（D）several 接可數。

gept.question_en: There are only ___ apples left in the basket.
gept.explanation_zh: apples 為可數，「有一些」用 a few，故選（C）a few。（A）much 接不可數。（B）a little 接不可數。（D）little 接不可數。

gept.question_en: I have ___ money, so I can buy you a drink.
gept.explanation_zh: money 為不可數，肯定「有一些」用 a little，故選（C）a little。（A）a few、（B）few 接可數。（D）little 表「幾乎沒有」。

gept.question_en: ___ of the students passed the difficult exam.
gept.explanation_zh: 「大部分」用 Most of，故選（A）Most。（B）Almost 為副詞。（C）Much 接不可數。（D）Each 強調個別。

gept.question_en: There is ___ water in the bottle; we need to refill it.
gept.explanation_zh: 否定語意「幾乎沒有」用 little，故選（B）little。（A）a little 為肯定。（C）few、（D）many 接可數。

gept.question_en: ___ of my friends like spicy food.
gept.explanation_zh: 「好幾個」用 Several，故選（B）Several。（A）Much 接不可數。（C）Every、（D）Each 後須接單數名詞。

gept.question_en: ___ of the milk has gone bad.
gept.explanation_zh: milk 為不可數，「大部分」用 Most of，故選（B）Most。（A）Many、（C）A few、（D）Several 接可數。

gept.question_en: ___ of the two answers is correct.
gept.explanation_zh: 兩者都不用 Neither，故選（B）Neither。（A）None 用於三者以上。（C）No one、（D）Nobody 指人。

gept.question_en: There aren't ___ students in the classroom today.
gept.explanation_zh: students 為可數，否定句用 many，故選（B）many。（A）much、（C）a little、（D）a great deal of 接不可數。

gept.question_en: ___ of the information is useful for our research.
gept.explanation_zh: information 為不可數，「沒有」用 None of，故選（D）None。（A）Many、（B）Few、（C）Several 接可數。

gept.question_en: I stayed home ___ I was feeling sick.
gept.explanation_zh: 表「因為」用 because，故選（B）because。（A）although 表讓步。（C）unless 表「除非」。（D）while 表「當……時」。

gept.question_en: ___ it was raining, we still went hiking.
gept.explanation_zh: 表讓步「雖然」用 Although，故選（B）Although。（A）Because 表原因。（C）Since 表自從或既然。（D）If 表條件。

gept.question_en: You will fail the test ___ you study harder.
gept.explanation_zh: 「除非」用 unless，故選（B）unless。（A）if 表條件正面。（C）when 表時間。（D）because 表原因。

gept.question_en: He kept reading ___ his sister was watching TV.
gept.explanation_zh: 同時進行用 while，故選（B）while。（A）because 表原因。（C）unless 表除非。（D）if 表條件。

gept.question_en: My brother likes math, ___ I prefer English.
gept.explanation_zh: 表對比「然而」用 whereas，故選（B）whereas。（A）because 表原因。（C）unless 表除非。（D）if 表條件。

gept.question_en: ___ you have finished your homework, you can watch TV.
gept.explanation_zh: 表「既然」用 Since，故選（B）Since。（A）Although 表讓步。（C）Unless 表除非。（D）While 表同時。

gept.question_en: I wanted to call you, ___ I lost your number.
gept.explanation_zh: 前後語意相反用 but，故選（B）but。（A）so 表結果。（C）because 表原因。（D）or 表選擇。

gept.question_en: Hurry up, ___ you will miss the bus.
gept.explanation_zh: 祈使句後「否則」用 or，故選（C）or。（A）and 表「就會」。（B）but 表轉折。（D）so 表結果。

gept.question_en: It was very late, ___ we decided to go home.
gept.explanation_zh: 表結果用 so，故選（B）so。（A）because 表原因。（C）but 表轉折。（D）or 表選擇。

gept.question_en: He didn't come ___ he was very busy.
gept.explanation_zh: 表原因用 because，故選（A）because。（B）although 讓步。（C）unless 除非。（D）while 同時。

gept.question_en: ___ Tom ___ Jerry enjoys the cartoon show.
gept.explanation_zh: 動詞 enjoys 為單數，主詞「兩者之一」用 Either...or，故選（B）。（A）Both...and 動詞用複數。（C）Neither...nor 語意為否定。（D）Not only...but also 須符合語意。

gept.question_en: ___ my parents ___ my brother knows about the surprise party.
gept.explanation_zh: 動詞 knows 為單數且語意為否定，用 Neither...nor，故選（C）。（A）Both...and 動詞用複數。（B）Either...or 為肯定。（D）Not only...but also 為肯定。

gept.question_en: She is ___ beautiful ___ smart.
gept.explanation_zh: 「既……又……」用 both...and，故選（A）。（B）either...or 表二選一。（C）neither...nor 表都不。（D）not...but 表否定對比。

gept.question_en: ___ the teacher ___ the students were satisfied with the result.
gept.explanation_zh: 「不只……而且……」用 Not only...but also，故選（D）。（A）Both...and 為簡單並列。（B）Either...or 二選一。（C）Neither...nor 為否定。

gept.question_en: You can have ___ tea ___ coffee, but not both.
gept.explanation_zh: 「二選一」用 either...or，故選（B）。（A）both...and 兩者皆要。（C）neither...nor 兩者皆無。（D）not only...but also 兩者皆有。

gept.question_en: I enjoy ___ to classical music on weekends.
gept.explanation_zh: enjoy 後接動名詞（V-ing），故選（A）listening。（B）listen 為原形，（C）to listen 為不定詞，（D）listened 為過去式，皆不合語法。

gept.question_en: She suggested ___ a movie after dinner.
gept.explanation_zh: suggest 後接動名詞，故選（B）watching。（A）to watch 不定詞、（C）watch 原形、（D）watched 過去式皆不可接 suggest。

gept.question_en: He avoids ___ junk food because he wants to stay healthy.
gept.explanation_zh: avoid 後接動名詞，故選（C）eating。（A）原形、（B）不定詞、（D）過去式皆形式不符。

gept.question_en: Have you finished ___ your homework yet?
gept.explanation_zh: finish 後接動名詞，故選（D）doing。（A）原形、（B）不定詞、（C）過去分詞皆不可。

gept.question_en: Would you mind ___ the window? It's a bit cold.
gept.explanation_zh: mind 後接動名詞，故選（A）closing。（B）不定詞、（C）原形、（D）過去分詞皆不合。

gept.question_en: I can't help ___ when I see that funny video.
gept.explanation_zh: can't help 後接動名詞，意為「忍不住」，故選（D）laughing。（A）（B）（C）皆不合。

gept.question_en: They denied ___ anything about the broken window.
gept.explanation_zh: deny 後接動名詞，故選（C）knowing。（A）原形、（B）不定詞、（D）過去分詞皆不對。

gept.question_en: He admitted ___ the cookies without permission.
gept.explanation_zh: admit 後接動名詞，故選（A）taking。（B）原形、（C）不定詞、（D）過去分詞皆不可。

gept.question_en: Please consider ___ the job offer carefully before deciding.
gept.explanation_zh: consider 後接動名詞，故選（D）accepting。（A）（B）（C）形式不對。

gept.question_en: She wants ___ a doctor when she grows up.
gept.explanation_zh: want 後接不定詞，故選（C）to become。（A）原形、（B）動名詞、（D）過去式皆不合。

gept.question_en: We decided ___ the party because of the rain.
gept.explanation_zh: decide 後接不定詞，故選（A）to cancel。（B）（C）（D）皆不合。

gept.question_en: I hope ___ you again soon.
gept.explanation_zh: hope 後接不定詞，故選（B）to see。（A）原形、（C）動名詞、（D）過去式皆不對。

gept.question_en: The little boy refused ___ his vegetables.
gept.explanation_zh: refuse 後接不定詞，故選（C）to eat。（A）（B）（D）皆不合。

gept.question_en: I promise ___ on time tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: promise 後接不定詞，故選（A）to arrive。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: My parents expect me ___ well in the exam.
gept.explanation_zh: expect + 受詞 + 不定詞，故選（B）to do。（A）（C）（D）皆不對。

gept.question_en: He learned ___ the guitar when he was ten.
gept.explanation_zh: learn 後接不定詞，故選（D）to play。其餘形式皆不對。

gept.question_en: We can't afford ___ a new car this year.
gept.explanation_zh: afford 後接不定詞，故選（A）to buy。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: She offered ___ me with my project.
gept.explanation_zh: offer 後接不定詞，故選（C）to help。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: I remember ___ off the lights before I left home.
gept.explanation_zh: remember + V-ing 表「記得做過某事」，故選（B）turning。（C）to turn 表「記得要做」與語意不符；（A）（D）形式錯誤。

gept.question_en: Don't forget ___ the door when you leave.
gept.explanation_zh: forget + 不定詞表「忘記要做」，故選（C）to lock。（B）locking 表「忘了做過」與情境不合。

gept.question_en: He stopped ___ a cigarette during the break.
gept.explanation_zh: stop + 不定詞表「停下來去做」，依「during the break」可知是停下來抽菸，故選（D）to smoke。（B）smoking 表「停止抽菸的習慣」與語意不合。

gept.question_en: I regret ___ you that your application was rejected.
gept.explanation_zh: regret + 不定詞表「遺憾要告知」，故選（A）to inform。（B）informing 表「後悔告知過」，依語境是現在要告知壞消息。

gept.question_en: She'll never forget ___ the Eiffel Tower for the first time.
gept.explanation_zh: forget + V-ing 表「忘記做過某事」，故選（C）seeing。（B）to see 表「忘記要做」與「for the first time」不合。

gept.question_en: I regret ___ so much money on that useless gadget.
gept.explanation_zh: regret + V-ing 表「後悔做過」，故選（B）spending。（C）to spend 表「遺憾要做」與語意不合。

gept.question_en: We tried ___ the door but it was locked.
gept.explanation_zh: try + 不定詞表「努力嘗試去做」，依語境「but it was locked」可知是嘗試開門，故選（C）to open。

gept.question_en: My mother made me ___ my room before going out.
gept.explanation_zh: make + 受詞 + 原形動詞，故選（A）clean。（B）（C）（D）形式皆不合。

gept.question_en: The teacher let us ___ home early.
gept.explanation_zh: let + 受詞 + 原形動詞，故選（B）go。其餘形式不合。

gept.question_en: You must ___ your seatbelt at all times.
gept.explanation_zh: 情態助動詞 must 後接原形動詞，故選（B）wear。其餘形式不合。

gept.question_en: She had her brother ___ her with the homework.
gept.explanation_zh: 使役動詞 have + 受詞 + 原形動詞，故選（B）help。（A）（C）（D）皆不合。

gept.question_en: I look forward to ___ from you soon.
gept.explanation_zh: look forward to 中的 to 是介系詞，後接動名詞，故選（A）hearing。（B）原形、（C）不定詞、（D）過去式皆不對。

gept.question_en: He is interested in ___ photography.
gept.explanation_zh: 介系詞 in 後接動名詞，故選（D）learning。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: Thank you for ___ me with the project.
gept.explanation_zh: 介系詞 for 後接動名詞，故選（B）helping。（A）（C）（D）皆不對。

gept.question_en: She is good at ___ the piano.
gept.explanation_zh: 介系詞 at 後接動名詞，故選（A）playing。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: I'm used to ___ up early every morning.
gept.explanation_zh: be used to 中的 to 是介系詞，後接動名詞，意「習慣於」，故選（D）getting。（B）to get 不定詞不適用此片語。

gept.question_en: He went to the library ___ for the exam.
gept.explanation_zh: 表目的用不定詞，故選（B）to study。其餘形式不合。

gept.question_en: In order ___ healthy, you should exercise regularly.
gept.explanation_zh: in order + to + 原形動詞，故選（C）to stay。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: She left early so as ___ the traffic.
gept.explanation_zh: so as + to + 原形動詞表目的，故選（D）to avoid。

gept.question_en: We took a taxi ___ time.
gept.explanation_zh: 表目的用不定詞，故選（A）to save。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: He works two jobs ___ enough money for college.
gept.explanation_zh: 表目的用不定詞，故選（B）to earn。

gept.question_en: I'm happy ___ you again after such a long time.
gept.explanation_zh: 形容詞 happy 後接不定詞，故選（C）to see。其餘形式不合。

gept.question_en: She was eager ___ the test results.
gept.explanation_zh: eager + 不定詞，故選（D）to know。

gept.question_en: This math problem is easy ___ .
gept.explanation_zh: easy + 不定詞，故選（D）to solve。

gept.question_en: He was lucky ___ the last train home.
gept.explanation_zh: lucky + 不定詞，故選（A）to catch。

gept.question_en: The coffee is too hot ___ right now.
gept.explanation_zh: too + 形 + 不定詞，故選（C）to drink。其餘不合。

gept.question_en: She spoke too quickly for me ___ .
gept.explanation_zh: too + 副 + for sb + 不定詞，故選（A）to understand。

gept.question_en: This box is light enough ___ with one hand.
gept.explanation_zh: enough + 不定詞，故選（A）to carry。

gept.question_en: I'm not tall enough ___ that shelf.
gept.explanation_zh: enough + 不定詞，故選（C）to reach。

gept.question_en: The woman ___ is talking to my mother is my new teacher.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 woman 為人且做主詞，故選（A）who。（B）which 用於物，（C）whose 表所有，（D）whom 為受格皆不合。

gept.question_en: That's the book ___ I borrowed from the library.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 book 為物，做受詞，故選（C）which。（A）（D）用於人。

gept.question_en: The student ___ phone is on the desk left early.
gept.explanation_zh: 表所有關係用 whose，故選（B）whose。其餘不表所有格。

gept.question_en: The man ___ you met yesterday is my uncle.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 man 為人，做受詞，正式用 whom，故選（D）whom。（B）who 雖口語可用，但 whom 為更正確的受格。

gept.question_en: I have a friend ___ lives in New York.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 friend 為人做主詞，故選（A）who。

gept.question_en: The dog ___ I saw in the park belonged to my neighbor.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 dog 為動物（物），故選（D）which。

gept.question_en: She is the writer ___ novels have been translated into many languages.
gept.explanation_zh: 表所有格用 whose，故選（B）whose。

gept.question_en: The car ___ is parked outside belongs to my brother.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 car 為物做主詞，that 可代替 which，故選（C）that。（A）（D）用於人，（B）表所有。

gept.question_en: Do you know the boy ___ I was talking to?
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 boy 為人做受詞，故選（B）whom。

gept.question_en: The movie ___ we watched last night was boring.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 movie 為物，that 可替代 which，故選（A）that。

gept.question_en: He's the teacher ___ taught me English in junior high.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 teacher 為人做主詞，故選（D）who。

gept.question_en: I bought a watch ___ has a leather strap.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 watch 為物做主詞，故選（C）which。

gept.question_en: The girl ___ won the prize is my classmate.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 girl 為人做主詞，故選（A）who。

gept.question_en: The artist ___ paintings I admire most is Van Gogh.
gept.explanation_zh: 表所有關係用 whose，故選（D）whose。

gept.question_en: This is the cake ___ my mother baked for my birthday.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 cake 為物，故選（D）which。

gept.question_en: This is the park ___ we used to play as children.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 park 為地點，故用關係副詞（A）where。

gept.question_en: I'll never forget the day ___ we first met.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 day 為時間，故用（C）when。

gept.question_en: Do you know the reason ___ she left so suddenly?
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 reason，用關係副詞（D）why。

gept.question_en: That's the restaurant ___ I had my birthday dinner.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 restaurant 為地點，故選（A）where。

gept.question_en: Summer is the season ___ many people go on vacation.
gept.explanation_zh: 先行詞 season 為時間，用關係副詞（C）when。

gept.question_en: My brother, ___ lives in Canada, is a doctor.
gept.explanation_zh: 非限定子句不可用 that；先行詞 brother 為人做主詞，故選（B）who。

gept.question_en: The Great Wall, ___ is in China, is a famous landmark.
gept.explanation_zh: 非限定子句指物用 which，不可用 that，故選（B）which。

gept.question_en: The book ___ I bought yesterday is very interesting.
gept.explanation_zh: 限定子句，先行詞 book 為物，可用 that，故選（B）that。

gept.question_en: Mr. Lee, ___ has been our neighbor for ten years, just moved away.
gept.explanation_zh: 非限定子句指人做主詞，用 who，不可用 that，故選（D）who。

gept.question_en: The man ___ next to me is my new colleague.
gept.explanation_zh: 簡化關係子句（who is sitting）用現在分詞，故選（C）sitting。

gept.question_en: The letter ___ yesterday was from my old friend.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動關係子句簡化用過去分詞（which was received），故選（C）received。

gept.question_en: The boy ___ in the corner is crying.
gept.explanation_zh: 主動關係子句簡化用現在分詞，故選（B）standing。

gept.question_en: Most of the products ___ in this factory are exported.
gept.explanation_zh: 被動關係子句簡化用過去分詞（that are made），故選（D）made。

gept.question_en: The children ___ in the park looked very happy.
gept.explanation_zh: 主動關係子句簡化用現在分詞，故選（B）playing。

gept.question_en: This pencil is ___ than that one.
gept.explanation_zh: 兩者比較用比較級，單音節 +er，故選（B）longer。（D）more long 不合英文用法。

gept.question_en: My new phone is ___ than my old one.
gept.explanation_zh: 多音節形容詞比較級用 more，故選（C）more expensive。

gept.question_en: Today is ___ than yesterday.
gept.explanation_zh: hot 為短形容詞，重複子音 +er，故選（A）hotter。

gept.question_en: She runs ___ than her brother.
gept.explanation_zh: 副詞 fast 比較級為 faster，故選（B）faster。

gept.question_en: This book is ___ than that one.
gept.explanation_zh: 多音節形容詞比較級用 more，故選（D）more interesting。

gept.question_en: Mount Everest is the ___ mountain in the world.
gept.explanation_zh: 三者以上比較用最高級，故選（C）highest。

gept.question_en: This is the ___ movie I have ever seen.
gept.explanation_zh: good 的最高級為 best，故選（C）best。

gept.question_en: He is the ___ student in our class.
gept.explanation_zh: 短形容詞最高級加 -est，故選（D）smartest。

gept.question_en: This is the ___ beautiful place I've ever visited.
gept.explanation_zh: 最高級加 the most + 多音節形容詞，故選（A）most。

gept.question_en: July is usually the ___ month of the year here.
gept.explanation_zh: 最高級 hottest，故選（D）hottest。

gept.question_en: My sister is ___ tall ___ my mother.
gept.explanation_zh: 同等比較用 as ... as，故選（A）as / as。

gept.question_en: He works ___ hard ___ his colleagues.
gept.explanation_zh: as + 副詞 + as 表同等程度，故選（A）as / as。

gept.question_en: She is ___ smart ___ her older brother.
gept.explanation_zh: 同等比較用 as ... as，故選（B）as / as。

gept.question_en: This box is twice ___ heavy ___ that one.
gept.explanation_zh: 倍數 + as + 形 + as，故選（D）as / as。

gept.question_en: The more you practice, ___ you become.
gept.explanation_zh: the + 比較級 ... the + 比較級結構，故選（B）the better。

gept.question_en: The harder he works, ___ he earns.
gept.explanation_zh: the + 比較級結構，故選（D）the more money。

gept.question_en: The older I get, ___ I appreciate my parents.
gept.explanation_zh: the + 比較級結構，故選（A）the more。

gept.question_en: ___ you study, the better your grades will be.
gept.explanation_zh: the + 比較級 ... the + 比較級，第一個空格也需 the more，故選（C）The more。

gept.question_en: The higher we climbed, ___ the air became.
gept.explanation_zh: the + 比較級結構，thin 短形容詞加 -ner，故選（D）the thinner。

gept.question_en: Never ___ such a beautiful sunset.
gept.explanation_zh: 否定副詞 Never 置句首要倒裝，現在完成式倒裝為 have + 主詞 + 過去分詞，故選（B）have I seen。

gept.question_en: Hardly ___ when the phone rang.
gept.explanation_zh: Hardly 置句首倒裝，過去完成式倒裝為 had + 主詞 + 過去分詞，故選（C）had I sat down。

gept.question_en: No sooner ___ home than it started to rain.
gept.explanation_zh: No sooner 置句首倒裝，過去完成式倒裝為 had + 主詞 + 過去分詞，故選（D）had I arrived。

gept.question_en: Seldom ___ such a kind person.
gept.explanation_zh: Seldom 置句首倒裝，現在簡單式倒裝為 do/does + 主詞 + 原形，故選（B）do I meet。

gept.question_en: Not only ___ smart, but he is also hardworking.
gept.explanation_zh: Not only 置句首倒裝，be 動詞句倒裝為 be + 主詞，故選（D）is he。

gept.question_en: The weather has a great ___ on our mood and daily activities.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) effect（名詞，影響）。（A) affect 是動詞「影響」。（C) effective 形容詞「有效的」。（D) affection 名詞「情感」。

gept.question_en: Could you ___ this word in the dictionary? I don't know what it means.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) look up（查閱）。（B) look after 照顧。（C) look for 尋找。（D) look into 調查。

gept.question_en: This math problem is so easy—it's a piece of ___.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) cake，慣用語 a piece of cake 意為「輕而易舉」。（A)(B)(C) 均非此慣用語的標準形式。

gept.question_en: You should ___ a decision before the deadline arrives.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) make。固定搭配 make a decision。（A) do 不與 decision 搭配。（B) take a decision 為英式罕用。（D) have 不正確。

gept.question_en: My brother ___ very well with all his classmates at school.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) gets along（相處融洽）。（B) gets up 起床。（C) gets over 克服。（D) gets off 下車。

gept.question_en: Please ___ me your pen for a moment; I'll return it soon.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) lend（借出）。（B) borrow 借入。（C) rent 租。（D) loan 多用於金錢借貸。

gept.question_en: The sun ___ in the east every morning without fail.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) rises（不及物，升起）。（A) raises 及物動詞「舉起」。（B) arises 出現。（D) arouses 喚起。

gept.question_en: She is a very ___ student who always gets top grades.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) intelligent（形容詞）。（A) intelligence 名詞。（B) intelligently 副詞。（C) intellect 名詞「智力」。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ until tomorrow what you can do today.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) put off（拖延）。（A) put on 穿上。（B) put up 舉起。（D) put out 熄滅。

gept.question_en: He told a funny joke to ___ the ice at the party.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) break，慣用語 break the ice 意為「打破僵局」。（B)(C)(D) 均非標準搭配。

gept.question_en: The exam is tomorrow, so I need to hit the ___ tonight.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) books，hit the books 意為「用功讀書」。（A) hit the road 上路。（C) hit the sack 睡覺。（D) hit the hay 睡覺。

gept.question_en: We've ___ milk; could you go buy some?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) run out of（用完）。（A) run into 偶遇。（B) run over 輾過。（C) run after 追趕。

gept.question_en: Please ___ a photo of us in front of the monument.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) take。固定搭配 take a photo。（A)(B)(D) 均非此處正確搭配。

gept.question_en: The teacher's clear explanation made the lesson much ___ to understand.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) easier（比較級）。（B) easy 原級。（C) easiest 最高級。（D) ease 名詞。

gept.question_en: He finally ___ to his parents' wishes and studied medicine.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) gave in（屈服）。（B) gave up 放棄。（C) gave out 分發。（D) gave away 贈送。

gept.question_en: She speaks English ___ after living abroad for ten years.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) fluently（副詞修飾動詞 speaks）。（A) fluent 形容詞。（C) fluency 名詞。（D) fluid 流體。

gept.question_en: The plane will ___ off in ten minutes; please fasten your seatbelt.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take off（起飛）。（B)(C)(D) 與 off 不構成此義片語。

gept.question_en: He's been ___ the books all night for tomorrow's test.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) hitting。hit the books 意為「努力讀書」。（A)(B)(D) 均非慣用搭配。

gept.question_en: My grandmother often ___ in bed when she feels tired.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) lies（lie 躺，現在式）。（B) lays 放置。（C) lied 說謊過去式。（D) laid 放置過去式。

gept.question_en: The students made great ___ in their English speaking skills.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) progress（名詞）。（A) progressive 形容詞。（B) progressively 副詞。（D) progressed 動詞過去式。

gept.question_en: I can't ___ this heavy box; it's too heavy for me.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) raise（及物，舉起）。（A) rise 不及物。（B) arise 出現。（C) arouse 喚起。

gept.question_en: The detective decided to ___ the mysterious case carefully.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) look into（調查）。（A) look after 照顧。（B) look up 查閱。（D) look out 小心。

gept.question_en: The movie was so ___ that the audience couldn't stop laughing.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) amusing（令人發笑的，物作主詞）。（B) amuse 動詞。（C) amused 用於人。（D) amusement 名詞。

gept.question_en: Don't worry about the small mistake; it's no ___ deal.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) big。慣用語 no big deal 意為「沒什麼大不了」。（A)(B)(C) 均非標準搭配。

gept.question_en: He's ___ to arrive at any minute now.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) bound。be bound to 意為「必定」。（A) binding 形容詞「有約束力的」。（B) bond 名詞。（C) bind 動詞原形。

gept.question_en: The students were asked to ___ the exam silently.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take。固定搭配 take an exam。（B) make 不搭配。（C) do 較口語但較弱。（D) get 不正確。

gept.question_en: Could you ___ the volume down? The baby is sleeping.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) turn。固定搭配 turn down（調低音量）。（A) switch 多指開關。（B) change 改變。（D) make 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The teacher asked us to ___ our homework before class.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) hand in（繳交）。（A) hand on 傳承。（B) hand out 分發。（D) hand over 移交。

gept.question_en: It's raining ___ and dogs outside; take an umbrella.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) cats。慣用語 rain cats and dogs 意為「下傾盆大雨」。（A)(B)(C) 均非標準搭配。

gept.question_en: She is ___ to finish the marathon in less than four hours.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) able。固定搭配 be able to do。（A) capable 須接 of。（B) possible 用於事物。（C) probable 用於事物。

gept.question_en: The factory ___ out a lot of smoke into the air.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) gives。give out 意為「散發、釋出」。（A) sends out 多用於發送訊息。（B) puts out 熄滅。（C) makes out 辨認。

gept.question_en: He apologized ___ for being late to the meeting.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) sincerely（副詞修飾動詞 apologized）。（A) sincere 形容詞。（C) sincerity 名詞。（D) insincere 形容詞，反義。

gept.question_en: I need to ___ a doctor's appointment for next week.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) make。固定搭配 make an appointment。（B) do 不搭配。（C) take 不搭配。（D) have 較弱。

gept.question_en: The students ___ up at six o'clock every morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) get。固定搭配 get up（起床）。（A) take up 占用。（B) make up 編造。（C) do up 扣緊。

gept.question_en: The accident had a serious ___ on his health.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) effect（名詞，影響）。（A) affect 動詞。（C) effective 形容詞。（D) affection 名詞「情感」。

gept.question_en: She accidentally ___ the keys on the table this morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) laid（lay 放置的過去式）。（A) lay 原形。（B) lied 說謊的過去式。（D) lain lie 躺的過去分詞。

gept.question_en: The price of gasoline has ___ sharply this year.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) risen（rise 不及物，上漲的過去分詞）。（A) raised 及物。（B) arose 出現的過去式。（C) aroused 喚起。

gept.question_en: He couldn't ___ his anger when he heard the bad news.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) hold back（抑制）。（B) hold up 舉起／搶劫。（C) hold on 等一下。（D) hold out 伸出／堅持。

gept.question_en: That's a great idea! Let's ___ it a try.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) give。固定搭配 give it a try（試試看）。（A)(B)(D) 均非此處搭配。

gept.question_en: I'm ___ on you to help me with this project.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) counting。count on 意為「依靠」。（A)(B)(C) 均無此片語意義。

gept.question_en: His ___ to detail makes him an excellent editor.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) attention（名詞）。（A) attend 動詞。（B) attentive 形容詞。（D) attentively 副詞。

gept.question_en: They got ___ in heavy traffic and were late for dinner.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) caught up。get caught up in 意為「陷入」。（A) caught 單獨不完整。（B) catch 原形。（C) catching 進行式不正確。

gept.question_en: The teacher told the children to ___ quiet during the test.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) keep。固定搭配 keep quiet（保持安靜）。（B)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: I've been ___ forward to this trip for months.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) looking。look forward to 意為「期待」。（A)(B)(C) 均無此片語。

gept.question_en: The new policy will ___ effect next month.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take。固定搭配 take effect（生效）。（B)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He is the ___ student in our class; he always gets A's.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) smartest（最高級）。（A) smart 原級。（B) smarter 比較級。（D) smartly 副詞。

gept.question_en: Please ___ care of yourself while traveling abroad.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) take。固定搭配 take care of。（A) make 不搭配。（C) do 不搭配。（D) have 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The room was ___ decorated for the wedding.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) beautifully（副詞修飾過去分詞 decorated）。（A) beauty 名詞。（B) beautiful 形容詞。（D) beautify 動詞。

gept.question_en: Let's ___ a break and have some coffee.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) take。固定搭配 take a break。（A)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He's always ___ excuses for being late.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) making。固定搭配 make excuses。（A)(B)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: The children ___ along very well with each other.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) get。get along with 意為「相處融洽」。（A)(B)(D) 均不構成此片語。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ up so easily; keep trying!
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) give。give up 意為「放棄」。（A) take up 開始。（B) make up 編造。（C) go up 上升。

gept.question_en: The ___ of the building is impressive.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) height（名詞，高度）。（A) high 形容詞。（C) heighten 動詞。（D) highly 副詞。

gept.question_en: He ___ the truth to avoid trouble.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) lied（lie 說謊的過去式）。（A) lay lie 躺的過去式。（B) laid lay 放置的過去式。（D) lain lie 躺的過去分詞。

gept.question_en: The students ___ their teacher with respect.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) treat（對待）。（A) cure 治癒。（B) heal 痊癒。（C) handle 處理。

gept.question_en: We ran ___ an old friend at the supermarket yesterday.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) into。run into 意為「偶遇」。（B) run out of 用完。（C) run over 輾過。（D) run after 追趕。

gept.question_en: She gave him a piece of ___ for being so rude.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) her mind。慣用語 give somebody a piece of one's mind 意為「責罵」。（A)(C)(D) 不正確。

gept.question_en: The teacher asked us to ___ our books to page 50.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) turn。固定搭配 turn to a page。（A) change 改變。（B) switch 切換。（D) move 移動。

gept.question_en: He ___ his promise and helped us with the project.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) kept。固定搭配 keep a promise（遵守承諾）。（A)(B)(C) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: The temperature has ___ dramatically this winter.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) dropped。（A) fell 過去式無 has。（B) falling 進行式不搭配 has。（C) rose 不及物過去式無 has。

gept.question_en: He paid ___ to every detail of the contract.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) attention。固定搭配 pay attention to。（A) attend 動詞。（B) attentive 形容詞。（D) attentively 副詞。

gept.question_en: The little boy was ___ of the dark.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) afraid。固定搭配 be afraid of。（B) fear 名詞。（C) fearful 形容詞但較少用 of。（D) fearfully 副詞。

gept.question_en: They ___ off the wedding because of the storm.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) called。call off 意為「取消」。（B) take off 起飛。（C) put off 拖延。（D) make off 逃跑。

gept.question_en: I can't ___ my mind whether to go or stay.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) make。固定搭配 make up one's mind（下定決心）。（A)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: She is ___ in solving difficult math problems.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) skillful（形容詞，be skillful in）。（A) skill 名詞。（B) skillfully 副詞。（D) skillfulness 名詞。

gept.question_en: We need to ___ out of here before the storm hits.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) get。get out of 意為「離開」。（A)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: He ___ a deep breath before diving into the pool.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) took。固定搭配 take a breath。（A)(B)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: The teacher ___ out the homework to the students.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) handed。hand out 意為「分發」。（A) gave out 也可但 handed out 更貼切。（B) threw out 丟棄。（C) sent out 寄出。

gept.question_en: He is the ___ person I know; he never gives up.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) determined（形容詞，堅定的）。（A) determine 動詞。（C) determining 進行式。（D) determination 名詞。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ on me; I'm counting on your support.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) let down（讓人失望）。（A) give up 放棄。（C) take off 起飛。（D) put on 穿上。

gept.question_en: The new restaurant ___ delicious food at reasonable prices.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) serves（提供餐點）。（A) sells 賣。（B) supplies 供應原料較常見。（D) provides 較廣義。

gept.question_en: The little girl ___ her mother around all day.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) followed（跟隨）。（B) chased 追逐。（C) pursued 追求（較正式）。（D) trailed 拖。

gept.question_en: I'll ___ you back as soon as I get home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) call。call somebody back 意為「回電」。（A) tell 告訴。（B) speak 說。（C) talk 談話。

gept.question_en: This shirt is ___ than that one.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) more expensive（比較級）。（A) expensive 原級。（C) most expensive 最高級。（D) expensively 副詞。

gept.question_en: The boss ___ the meeting until next Monday.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) postponed（延後到某時）。（A) extended 延長。（B) delayed 耽擱。（C) cancelled 取消。

gept.question_en: She has ___ many awards for her research.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) received（現在完成式）。（A) receive 原形。（C) receiving 進行式。（D) receives 第三人稱單數。

gept.question_en: They ___ off the trip due to bad weather.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) called。call off 意為「取消」。（A) take off 起飛。（C) put off 延期（仍會辦）。（D) made off 逃跑。

gept.question_en: The food in this restaurant is ___ delicious.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) absolutely（副詞修飾形容詞 delicious）。（A) absolute 形容詞。（C) absoluteness 名詞。（D) absolutist 名詞/形容詞。

gept.question_en: He ___ his promise and arrived on time.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) kept。keep a promise 意為「遵守承諾」。（A) broke 違背。（C)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The students ___ to the teacher's instructions carefully.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) listened。listen to 為固定搭配。（A) heard 聽見（無 to）。（C) sounded 聽起來。（D) noticed 注意到。

gept.question_en: The thief ___ away with the jewelry.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) got。get away with 意為「逃脫懲罰」。（B) ran away 逃跑（不接 with）。（C)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: She speaks three languages ___.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) fluently（副詞）。（A) fluent 形容詞。（B) fluency 名詞。（D) fluidly 流暢地（語境不準）。

gept.question_en: The doctor advised him to ___ smoking.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) give up（戒掉）。（A) take up 開始從事。（B) make up 編造。（C) put up 搭建。

gept.question_en: This problem is too ___ for me to solve alone.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) difficult（形容詞）。（A) difficulty 名詞。（C) difficulties 名詞複數。（D) 名詞罕用。

gept.question_en: He always ___ his best in everything he does.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) does。固定搭配 do one's best。（A)(C)(D) 均不搭配。

gept.question_en: They ___ across an old photo while cleaning the attic.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) came。come across 意為「偶然發現」。（B) ran across 較少用。（C)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The students ___ a lot of fun at the picnic.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) had。固定搭配 have fun。（A)(B)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The new student is very ___; he answers all the questions correctly.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) intelligent（形容詞）。（B) intelligence 名詞。（C) intelligently 副詞。（D) intellect 名詞。

gept.question_en: Please ___ your shoes before entering the house.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take off（脫掉）。（B) put on 穿上。（C) get off 下車。（D) turn off 關掉。

gept.question_en: He ___ the responsibility for the mistake.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) took。固定搭配 take responsibility。（A)(B)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The package will be ___ tomorrow morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) delivered（被動式）。（A) deliver 原形。（C) delivery 名詞。（D) delivering 進行式。

gept.question_en: He ___ on the brakes to avoid hitting the dog.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) stepped。固定搭配 step on the brakes（踩剎車）。（A)(B)(C) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The teacher told us to ___ our seats.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take。固定搭配 take a seat。（B)(C)(D) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: The new manager ___ over the company last month.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) took。take over 意為「接管」。（A)(B)(C) 不搭配。

gept.question_en: She is ___ excited about her trip to Paris.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) extremely（副詞修飾形容詞 excited）。（A) extreme 形容詞。（C) extremity 名詞。（D) 名詞複數。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ the truth; honesty is the best policy.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) lie（說謊，原形與 don't 連用）。（A) lay 放置。（C) laid 過去式。（D) lying 進行式。

gept.question_en: He ___ the heavy box onto the truck with great effort.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) raised（及物動詞，抬起）。（A) rose 不及物。（B) arose 出現。（C) aroused 喚起。

gept.question_en: The class was so ___ that several students fell asleep.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) boring（令人感到無聊，物作主詞）。（A) bore 動詞。（C) bored 用於人。（D) boredom 名詞。

gept.question_en: My alarm clock ___ at 7 a.m. every day.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) goes off（響起）。（B) goes on 繼續。（C) goes out 外出。（D) goes up 上升。

gept.question_en: She has a ___ knowledge of European history.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) wide（形容詞）。（B) width 名詞。（C) widely 副詞。（D) widen 動詞。
